data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for payment collection through Stripe, but there is no evidence presented that confirms the integration or functionality of Stripe for payment processing. The linked use case mentions the need for payment collection, yet the evidence does not include any details or confirmations regarding the Stripe payment processing, leading to a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming the integration or functionality of Stripe for payment collection.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
